repair_candidate.summary: Repair #89800 on the contributor branch so semantic session_status({ sessionKey: "current" }) uses the normalized requestedKeyInput path consistently, including whitespace-decorated current input, while preserving the existing WebChat requester-session fix for #89773.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): resolve webchat current session status
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## What Problem This Solves

Repairs the focused #89800 fix for #89773, where `session_status({ sessionKey: "current" })` can resolve against the wrong WebChat session.

## Why This Change Was Made

The hydrated review raised one narrow edge: the PR compares the raw `sessionKey` to `"current"` even though the tool also computes a trimmed `requestedKeyInput`. The repair should make the semantic-current branch use the normalized input consistently and add coverage for whitespace-decorated `current` input without changing unrelated session lookup behavior.

## User Impact

WebChat tools asking for the current session should keep reporting the active requester session, including when the input arrives with harmless surrounding whitespace.

## Evidence

- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/89800 by @sweetcornna
- Linked issue: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/89773
- Current artifact main: 739e6cbbf88eee016efa5b353a76f5154db69978
- Required validation: `pnpm test src/agents/openclaw-tools.session-status.test.ts` and `pnpm check:changed`
credit_notes: Repair the existing contributor PR rather than replacing it; preserve @sweetcornna as the source PR author for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/89800.
PR body should keep the #89773 user-facing bug context and note that the repair addresses the reviewer-raised whitespace-normalization edge.
